Startup Website Launch Sprints

Launch your startup's marketing website in days with a clear, conversion-focused approach.

Service Overview

Startup Website Launch Sprints help startups and innovation teams rapidly move from problem identification to a copy-driven website optimized for conversions, and easy to update.

As a founder, you need a professional site that clearly communicates your vision, captures leads, and validates your concept—fast. You need someone to guide you through the process of creating a clear brand message, designing a conversion-focused website, and bringing that website to life. And that’s where I can help.

My Startup Marketing Website Sprint delivers an online presence that acts as a strategic tool to validate ideas and accelerate your growth.

My Framework: From Idea to Launch

A proven process to help you turn your startup idea to a fully-functioning website that sends a clear message and generates leads.

Phase 1: Discovery & Research

We start with a questionnaire to uncover your core message, target users, and goals. I’ll research competitors to help you position your idea in a way that stands out.

Phase 2: Wireframing and Content Structure

Homepage and key pages laid out in low-fidelity wireframes. Draft conversion copy and key sections (hero, value props, social proof, CTA, FAQs).

Phase 3: Visual Design

Translate approved wires into an on-brand design with usability and accessibility best practices.

Phase 4: Development

Develop a responsive site with clean structure, performance optimizations, and CMS where needed.

Phase 5: Launch, Onboarding, and Support

Cross-browser/device testing, basic SEO setup, go-live, and a short handover session so you can edit without code. Includes post-launch support for 14 that covers any bugs.

What’s Included

  • Custom copy and messaging honed for your audience
  • 1-5 pages (e.g., homepage, features, about, contact) with lead capture
  • Webflow CMS for effortless updates
  • Mobile optimization and basic SEO setup
  • Basic accessibility compliance
  • Two revision rounds and post-launch guide
  • Ongoing support for 14 days covering any bugs that show up

Who Should Consider Web Launch Sprints?

Early-Stage Startups

  • Validate product-market fit
  • Test core assumptions
  • Reduce development risk
  • Attract investor interest

Established Companies

  • Explore new market opportunities
  • Innovate existing products
  • Solve complex user problems
  • Accelerate decision-making

Frequently Asked Questions

It’s a focused 2-week process designed to take your startup from idea to a fully functional, conversion-ready website. Instead of dragging out the process for months, we move quickly and launch something real that you can test and grow with.

The cost for 1 page website starts from $2,500, and for a 3-5 page website it starts from $4,500.

By the end of the sprint, you’ll have a fully launched Webflow website, optimized for both desktop and mobile, complete with tailored UX/UI design, conversion-focused structure, and technical performance enhancements. You’ll also receive guidance on content and messaging to ensure your site communicates clearly.

Most startups complete the sprint in 2 weeks. This includes structured phases for design, development, and launch. If your project has additional custom features, I'll let you know upfront if more time is needed.

Yes—having your brand assets (logo, colors, fonts), any existing content, and clarity on your core offer will speed things up. If you don’t have finalized copy, I’ll provide structure and polish to get your messaging ready for launch.

Absolutely. The sprint gives you a strong foundation, but your website can grow with you. I can provide ongoing support, or you can manage updates internally—Webflow makes it simple to edit content without needing code.

I provide guidance and refinement on your website’s messaging to ensure it’s clear and conversion-focused. For startups that need full copywriting support, I can recommend partner copywriters who specialize in brand storytelling.

I build and launch all websites in Webflow, and the wireframing and design phase is done in Figma. Collaborative feedback is handled through Loom videos, live calls, and project management tools. This keeps the process transparent and efficient.

If you need a professional, fast, and scalable website to validate your product, attract investors, or start selling, this sprint is designed for you. It’s not ideal for companies who want a months-long traditional agency process.

Launch Your Startup Website in Days

Book your Website Sprint today and get a clear, conversion-focused site that’s built to grow with your business.
